title: Toyota Lexus Press In Front Wheel Drive AWD Hub And Bearing Replacement Instructions
description: Master Technician shows the DIY how-to removal and installation procedure, which applies to many Lexus and Toyota models, including Camry, Corolla, RAV4, Highlander, Solara, Matrix, Prius, RX300, RX330, RX350, ES300, ES330, ES350 etc.
